details.test: Task 1: Save second-trimester prenatal vitamin article with >=400 mcg folic acid
Task 2: Create and save birth plan with exactly 5 selected preferences
Task 3: Calculate due date and open current pregnancy week guide
Task 4: Build reading list of 3 top-rated newborn sleep articles (adapted to available data)
Task 5: Create baby health planner schedule with 3 vaccination/check-up appointments
Task 6: Compare 2 qualifying breast pumps side by side
Task 7: Customize and save hospital bag checklist (target 6 mom + 4 baby items)
Task 8: Post anonymous back pain topic in Third Trimester forum
Task 9: Configure weekly pregnancy newsletter subscription for week 10
